verdict.answer_first: A states the actionable answer immediately: "For a side project, default to a platform like Render or Fly." B also starts directly, but adds more provider spread: "Render/Fly/Railway".
verdict.decisiveness: A commits slightly more cleanly with "My concrete pick: start on Fly or Render" while B gives a broader survey including "Render/Fly/Railway" and provider distinctions.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on right now because it gives a concrete default and migration trigger: "start on Fly or Render... only graduate to a VPS if you hit a real limitation".
